info.title: odata
info.description: CLI tool for managing OData metadata in projects. Supports adding and updating OData service metadata files, similar to how dotnet ef manages migrations.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: OData CLI tool for managing OData metadata in projects

commands.name: add
commands.description: Add OData metadata to a project

commands.name: update
commands.description: Update OData metadata from the server
